features.description: Enforce primitive catalog reuse and prevent semantic-to-primitive regressions.
Keep semantic rules canonical and mapped to shared IntentIR primitives.
Split CUDA lowering/codegen into compiler-style stage modules.
Split RVV codegen path into compiler-style stage modules.
Unify stage timing and failure reason reporting across RVV/CUDA backends.
Promote CUDA/RVV pipeline drivers from no-op shims to staged contract validators.
Start performance-oriented schedule heuristics tuning with measurable stage timing deltas.
Audit macro-style semantics to ensure they compose from shared IntentIR primitives.
Implement rewrite-count aware legalize/schedule optimization and validate timing deltas against wave1 baseline.
Introduce op-family specific schedule profiles and validate stage timing deltas against wave2 baseline.
Add profile-specialized schedule override knobs and validate timing deltas against wave3 baseline.
Enforce backend compiler purity gate: no deprecated codegen fallback path and no deferred compile/launch stages.
Add nightly backend performance budget gate with timing_delta regression thresholds.
Execute backend compiler wave6 on expanded kernel families and keep performance budget gate green.
Execute backend compiler wave7 on expanded math/compare family kernels and keep backend gate green.
Execute backend compiler wave8 on additional unary/binary kernels and keep backend gate green.
Execute backend compiler wave9 on the next expanded kernel family set and keep backend gate green.
Execute backend compiler wave10 on the next expanded kernel family set and keep backend gate green.
Execute backend compiler wave11 on the next expanded kernel family set and keep backend gate green.
Execute backend compiler wave12 on the next expanded kernel family set and keep backend gate green.
Execute backend compiler wave13 on the next expanded kernel family set and keep backend gate green.
Execute backend compiler wave14 on the next expanded kernel family set and keep backend gate green.
